title: Kernel orthestrationについて、codexだけでなくglmやclaudeとの協奏として設定されているか確認せよ
summary_text: 1. **Critical**: deterministic smoke path does not execute launcher/guard runtime integration. [`codex-prompt-launch`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/bin/codex-prompt-launch):371 branches on `SMOKE_RESULT_MARKER`, runs only `preflight`, emits synthetic ack, and exits at line 391. [`check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh):171 validates only ack/marker text, not `launch -> monitor -> audit` behavior. Result: smoke can pass while real guarded launch is broken. 2. **High**: guard still has a session-smoke bypass trigger. [`cli.py`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/cli.py):97 treats any command containing `SMOKE_RESULT_MARKER=` as `allow_no_session`. Result: token-shaped input can bypass rollout-session enforcement semantics. 3. **High**: bootstrap evidence is trusted without integrity/freshness checks. [`codex-prompt-launch`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/bin/codex-prompt-launch):349 exports `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_EVIDENCE_PATH`. [`cli.py`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/cli.py):498 loads that file and at line 510 replaces observed model evidence. Result: stale/tampered evidence can satisfy provider gate even when live external lanes are absent. 4. **Medium**: contract drift remains on `/vote` static gate. [`vote.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/vote.md):36 wording does not match the strict expected phrase; static check currently fails (`test-codex-vote-prompt.sh`). Result: policy/doc consistency is not clean across prompts. **Decision**: acceptable as an **interim** production baseline only if deterministic smoke is treated as a startup sanity check, not as the sole production gate. As a full production baseline, it is **not yet sufficient** until items 1 and 2 are fixed. **Verification run in this lane**: [`test-codex-kernel-prompt.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-codex-kernel-prompt.sh) passed static checks; [`test-codex-vote-prompt.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-codex-vote-prompt.sh) failed 2 checks; runtime Python integration tests were blocked by sandbox tempdir restrictions (not a code assertion pass/fail).
